title: meliosma dilleniifolia subsp. tenuis
intro: Meliosma dilleniifolia subsp. tenuis, also known as Tenuis, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Alangiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits associated with Meliosma dilleniifolia subsp. tenuis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as a tea or added to supplements.
